case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC VS. ANTONIO GALDAMEZ et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC AS TO DEFENDANT GALDAMEZ, ANTONIO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-29-2008
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC SERVED JUL-25-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GALDAMEZ, ANTONIO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-26-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-25-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-25-2009 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Dismissal
